orgPolicy.title: Invite Within The Law Resource — Now Live
orgPolicy.summary: Invite Ops published a temporary reference page for legal and compliance questions in recruiting. Replaces the paused training sessions.
bullets: Available at: sites.google.com/gusto.com/invite-academy/invite-within-the-law
Use this for any legal/compliance questions until the full training is refreshed

tp.point: The Invite Within the Law resource page is now live — share this with your team as the go-to reference for any legal/compliance recruiting questions while the full training is being refreshed.

orgPolicy.title: Onboarding Location Field — Update Complete
orgPolicy.summary: PeopleTech has finished updating the Onboarding Location field in Greenhouse. The four standardized options are now live.
bullets: Options: Remote, San Francisco, New York, Denver
Data now flows into Workday automatically
Verify your open offers have the correct location set

tp.point: Greenhouse Onboarding Location field is now updated — double-check your open offers are using one of the four new options (Remote, SF, NY, Denver) so Workday picks it up correctly.

orgPolicy.title: California Relocation Language — Coming Soon
orgPolicy.summary: With California Bill 692, Invite Ops has worked with Legal and Comp to finalize relocation agreement language for candidates moving into California.
bullets: Language applies to candidates relocating to California
Details coming soon — watch for IOPE update before using

orgPolicy.title: Auto-Population of Offer Details — In Progress
orgPolicy.summary: Invite Ops is working with PeopleTech to auto-populate job-related fields in offer details, reducing manual recruiter effort.
bullets: Job-related fields will flow directly into offer details when an offer is created
More details coming soon

orgPolicy.title: PeopleOS — Recruiter DayPlay & Debrief Agent Targeting This Week
orgPolicy.summary: Both InviteOS features are targeting launch the week of June 8.
bullets: Recruiter DayPlay: UAT in progress, live in staging
Debrief Agent: Build complete, final refinements underway
PE recommendations for next batch of InviteOS builds coming soon

tp.point: Two InviteOS features are targeting launch this week — Recruiter DayPlay and Debrief Agent. Watch for an announcement from IOPE.

items.heading: Headcount Planning Audit — Due EOD Wednesday June 10
bullets: Jaime and Lisa are running a cross-org headcount planning audit to understand how planning works today and build something better
Each PE: open and copy the audit doc, work through 6 sections (tools, how planning works, where the process feels broken), share responses with Jaime and Lisa by EOD June 10
Link: docs.google.com/document/d/17tB4A1SR1pxrbTygDonhQBaw1NybuHtReQiTdzwrwF8

items.heading: Design Thinking Workshop — Tomorrow, June 11, 1–2pm PT
bullets: Pre-work (~20 min) due by EOD TODAY (June 9 deadline) — link in #invite-team
Goal: examine end-to-end Invite process, identify automation and simplicity opportunities
Output: Invite PEs will prioritize improvements as FY27 workstreams

items.heading: Meesh Plante — Last Day June 10
bullets: Contractor supporting scheduling across Data, SWE intern, L6/L7, Symmetry, PM/PD and more
Coordinate any open scheduling needs before Tuesday

items.heading: Gabe Cadavillo — Last Day June 12
bullets: On Lisa's GTM team — last day this Thursday
Ensure open req coverage is in place

items.heading: Jaime & Kebone Promotions — Now in Effect
bullets: Jaime: all Eng hiring (SWE, AIT, Security, Infrastructure) — 8 FTEs + Jeff Myers + Nico Watson (contractors)
Kebone: PM/PD + Data — 7 recruiters, new POC for Julia King (Data)
One-pod mentality continues — flex resources across orgs as needed

items.heading: Goose Testing with People Insights
bullets: Invite Ops collaborating with People Insights to test Goose, a new AI reporting tool
Early-stage — watch for updates on how it affects recruiting reporting

items.heading: IKB Migration to Notion — Ongoing
bullets: Full rebuild of Invite KB underway; survey results from June 5 informing IKB 2.0 structure
